maintenances.description: Screen panel starts flickering heavily when running at 60Hz and has vertical lines on the right side.
Brake pads worn out, need replacement. Check engine light is on.
Battery drains quickly, needs diagnostic check.
Intermittent packet loss on port 8. Firmware update required.
Display has dead pixel cluster in top-left corner.
RAID array degraded, one drive failed. Need hot-swap replacement.
Keyboard backlight not working, USB port loose.

items.notes: Physically verified. Screen and keyboard are in perfect shape.
